```
1. package com.earring.ui.components
2. 
3. import android.graphics.BitmapFactory
4. import androidx.compose.foundation.Canvas
5. import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxWidth
6. import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.height
7. import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
8. import androidx.compose.runtime.remember
9. import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
10. import androidx.compose.ui.geometry.Offset
11. import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
12. import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.asImageBitmap
13. import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.drawscope.DrawScope
14. import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
15. import androidx.compose.ui.unit.Dp
16. import androidx.compose.ui.unit.IntOffset
17. import androidx.compose.ui.unit.IntSize
18. import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
19. import com.earring.EarRingCore
20. import com.earring.R
21. 
22. enum class NoteState { EXPECTED, CORRECT, INCORRECT, ACTIVE }
23. 
24. data class StaffNote(
25.     val midi: Int,
26.     val state: NoteState
27. )
28. 
29. @Composable
30. fun MusicStaff(
31.     notes: List<StaffNote>,
32.     modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
33.     lineSpacingDp: Dp = 12.dp,
34.     fixedSpacingDp: Dp? = null
35. ) {
36.     val context = LocalContext.current
37.     val clefBitmap = remember {
38.         BitmapFactory.decodeResource(context.resources, R.drawable.ic_treble_clef)
39.             ?.asImageBitmap()
40.     }
41. 
42.     Canvas(
43.         modifier = modifier
44.             .fillMaxWidth()
45.             .height(160.dp)
46.     ) {
47.         val lineSpacing = lineSpacingDp.toPx()
48.         val staffTop = size.height / 2f - 2 * lineSpacing
49.         // Left margin is proportional to line spacing so it scales with density
50.         val leftMargin = lineSpacing * 4.2f
51.         val noteRadius = lineSpacing * 0.45f
52. 
53.         // Draw 5 staff lines
54.         for (i in 0..4) {
55.             val y = staffTop + i * lineSpacing
56.             drawLine(
57.                 color = Color(0xFF333333),
58.                 start = Offset(leftMargin, y),
59.                 end = Offset(size.width - 16f, y),
60.                 strokeWidth = 1.5f
61.             )
62.         }
63. 
64.         // Draw treble clef from bundled PNG (Android system fonts lack U+1D11E)
65.         clefBitmap?.let { bmp ->
66.             val clefH = (lineSpacing * 7f).toInt()
67.             val clefW = (clefH * bmp.width.toFloat() / bmp.height.toFloat()).toInt()
68.             val clefTop = (staffTop - lineSpacing * 1.5f).toInt()
69.             drawImage(
70.                 image = bmp,
71.                 dstOffset = IntOffset(2, clefTop),
72.                 dstSize = IntSize(clefW, clefH)
73.             )
74.         }
75. 
76.         // Distribute notes horizontally
77.         val noteAreaStart = leftMargin + lineSpacing
78.         val noteAreaWidth = size.width - noteAreaStart - 16f
79.         val noteCount = notes.size.coerceAtLeast(1)
80.         val noteStep = if (fixedSpacingDp != null) fixedSpacingDp.toPx() else noteAreaWidth / noteCount.toFloat()
81. 
82.         notes.forEachIndexed { index, staffNote ->
83.             val staffPos = EarRingCore.staffPosition(staffNote.midi)
84.             val staffCenter = staffTop + 2 * lineSpacing
85.             val noteY = staffCenter - staffPos * (lineSpacing / 2f)
86.             val noteX = noteAreaStart + index * noteStep + noteStep / 2f
87. 
88.             val noteColor = when (staffNote.state) {
89.                 NoteState.EXPECTED -> Color(0xFF333333)
90.                 NoteState.CORRECT -> Color(0xFF4CAF50)
91.                 NoteState.INCORRECT -> Color(0xFFF44336)
92.                 NoteState.ACTIVE -> Color(0xFF3F51B5)
93.             }
94. 
95.             drawLedgerLines(noteX, noteY, staffTop, lineSpacing, noteRadius)
96. 
97.             drawCircle(color = noteColor, radius = noteRadius, center = Offset(noteX, noteY))
98.             if (staffNote.state == NoteState.EXPECTED) {
99.                 drawCircle(color = Color.White, radius = noteRadius - 2.5f, center = Offset(noteX, noteY))
100.             }
101.         }
102.     }
103. }
104. 
105. private fun DrawScope.drawLedgerLines(
106.     noteX: Float,
107.     noteY: Float,
108.     staffTop: Float,
109.     lineSpacing: Float,
110.     noteRadius: Float
111. ) {
112.     val staffBottom = staffTop + 4 * lineSpacing
113.     val ledgerWidth = noteRadius * 2.8f
114. 
115.     var y = staffTop - lineSpacing
116.     while (noteY <= y + 1f) {
117.         drawLine(color = Color(0xFF555555), start = Offset(noteX - ledgerWidth, y), end = Offset(noteX + ledgerWidth, y), strokeWidth = 1.5f)
118.         y -= lineSpacing
119.     }
120. 
121.     y = staffBottom + lineSpacing
122.     while (noteY >= y - 1f) {
123.         drawLine(color = Color(0xFF555555), start = Offset(noteX - ledgerWidth, y), end = Offset(noteX + ledgerWidth, y), strokeWidth = 1.5f)
124.         y += lineSpacing
125.     }
126. }
127. 
128. enum class NoteState { EXPECTED, CORRECT, INCORRECT, ACTIVE }
129. 
130. data class StaffNote(
131.     val midi: Int,
132.     val state: NoteState
133. )
134. 
135. @Composable
136. fun MusicStaff(
137.     notes: List<StaffNote>,
138.     modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
139.     lineSpacingDp: Dp = 12.dp,
140.     fixedSpacingDp: Dp? = null
141. ) {
142.     Canvas(
143.         modifier = modifier
144.             .fillMaxWidth()
145.             .height(160.dp)
146.     ) {
147.         val lineSpacing = lineSpacingDp.toPx()
148.         val staffTop = size.height / 2f - 2 * lineSpacing
149.         val leftMargin = 60f
150.         val noteRadius = lineSpacing * 0.45f
151. 
152.         // Draw 5 staff lines
153.         for (i in 0..4) {
154.             val y = staffTop + i * lineSpacing
155.             drawLine(
156.                 color = Color(0xFF333333),
157.                 start = Offset(leftMargin, y),
158.                 end = Offset(size.width - 16f, y),
159.                 strokeWidth = 1.5f
160.             )
161.         }
162. 
163.         // Draw treble clef symbol using native canvas for proper font fallback
164.         drawIntoCanvas { canvas ->
165.             val paint = android.graphics.Paint(android.graphics.Paint.ANTI_ALIAS_FLAG).apply {
166.                 textSize = lineSpacing * 4.8f
167.                 color = android.graphics.Color.parseColor("#333333")
168.             }
169.             canvas.nativeCanvas.drawText(
170.                 "\uD834\uDD1E",
171.                 4f,
172.                 staffTop + lineSpacing * 3.8f,
173.                 paint
174.             )
175.         }
176. 
177.         // Distribute notes horizontally
178.         val noteAreaStart = leftMargin + 20f
179.         val noteAreaWidth = size.width - noteAreaStart - 20f
180.         val noteCount = notes.size.coerceAtLeast(1)
181.         val noteStep = if (fixedSpacingDp != null) fixedSpacingDp.toPx() else noteAreaWidth / noteCount.toFloat()
182. 
183.         notes.forEachIndexed { index, staffNote ->
184.             val staffPos = EarRingCore.staffPosition(staffNote.midi)
185.             // staffPos: C4=0, D4=1, ... each step = half line spacing
186.             val staffCenter = staffTop + 2 * lineSpacing // line 3 = B4 area
187.             val noteY = staffCenter - staffPos * (lineSpacing / 2f)
188.             val noteX = noteAreaStart + index * noteStep + noteStep / 2f
189. 
190.             val noteColor = when (staffNote.state) {
191.                 NoteState.EXPECTED -> Color(0xFF333333)
192.                 NoteState.CORRECT -> Color(0xFF4CAF50)
193.                 NoteState.INCORRECT -> Color(0xFFF44336)
194.                 NoteState.ACTIVE -> Color(0xFF3F51B5)
195.             }
196. 
197.             // Draw ledger lines if needed (outside staff lines 0-4)
198.             drawLedgerLines(noteX, noteY, staffTop, lineSpacing, noteRadius)
199. 
200.             // Draw note head
201.             drawCircle(
202.                 color = noteColor,
203.                 radius = noteRadius,
204.                 center = Offset(noteX, noteY)
205.             )
206.             // Hollow for expected notes
207.             if (staffNote.state == NoteState.EXPECTED) {
208.                 drawCircle(
209.                     color = Color.White,
210.                     radius = noteRadius - 2.5f,
211.                     center = Offset(noteX, noteY)
212.                 )
213.             }
214.         }
215.     }
216. }
217. 
218. private fun DrawScope.drawLedgerLines(
219.     noteX: Float,
220.     noteY: Float,
221.     staffTop: Float,
222.     lineSpacing: Float,
223.     noteRadius: Float
224. ) {
225.     val staffBottom = staffTop + 4 * lineSpacing
226.     val ledgerWidth = noteRadius * 2.8f
227. 
228.     // Above staff
229.     var y = staffTop - lineSpacing
230.     while (noteY <= y + 1f) {
231.         drawLine(
232.             color = Color(0xFF555555),
233.             start = Offset(noteX - ledgerWidth, y),
234.             end = Offset(noteX + ledgerWidth, y),
235.             strokeWidth = 1.5f
236.         )
237.         y -= lineSpacing
238.     }
239. 
240.     // Below staff
241.     y = staffBottom + lineSpacing
242.     while (noteY >= y - 1f) {
243.         drawLine(
244.             color = Color(0xFF555555),
245.             start = Offset(noteX - ledgerWidth, y),
246.             end = Offset(noteX + ledgerWidth, y),
247.             strokeWidth = 1.5f
248.         )
249.         y += lineSpacing
250.     }
251. }
252.
```

<sub>⏱️ 1914m 19s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Done ✅. The root cause was that Android ships `NotoSansSymbols-Regular-**Subsetted**.ttf` — the Musical Symbols block (U+1D11E) is deliberately stripped out to save space, so no amount of font fallback can display the treble clef character.

**Fix**: The clef is now rendered once on the dev machine (Windows has Segoe UI Symbol with full music glyph coverage) via `sharp`+SVG → PNG, bundled as `drawable-nodpi/ic_treble_clef.png`. `MusicStaff.kt` loads it with `BitmapFactory` and scales it dynamically to `7 × lineSpacing` tall (preserving aspect ratio) so it fits the staff correctly at all screen densities.

---

```
1. import React from 'react';
2. import { invoke } from '@tauri-apps/api/tauri';
3. import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
4. 
5. interface Props {
6.   sequence: number[];
7.   currentNoteIndex: number;
8.   highlightIndex: number;
9.   detected: { midi: number; correct: boolean }[];
10.   status: string;
11.   fixedSpacing?: number;
12. }
13. 
14. const NOTE_NAMES_SHARP = ['C','C#','D','D#','E','F','F#','G','G#','A','A#','B'];
15. 
16. function midiToLabel(midi: number): string {
17.   const octave = Math.floor(midi / 12) - 1;
18.   return `${NOTE_NAMES_SHARP[midi % 12]}${octave}`;
19. }
20. 
21. function useStaffPositions(sequence: number[]) {
22.   const [positions, setPositions] = useState<number[]>([]);
23.   useEffect(() => {
24.     if (sequence.length === 0) { setPositions([]); return; }
25.     Promise.all(sequence.map(midi => invoke<number>('cmd_staff_position', { midi }))).then(setPositions);
26.   }, [sequence]);
27.   return positions;
28. }
29. 
30. export default function MusicStaff({ sequence, currentNoteIndex, highlightIndex, detected, status, fixedSpacing }: Props) {
31.   const staffPositions = useStaffPositions(sequence);
32.   const svgWidth = 500;
33.   const svgHeight = 160;
34.   const lineSpacing = 12;
35.   const staffTop = svgHeight / 2 - 2 * lineSpacing;
36.   const leftMargin = 60;
37.   const noteRadius = lineSpacing * 0.45;
38.   const staffBottomY = staffTop + 4 * lineSpacing;
39. 
40.   const calcNoteY = (staffPos: number) => staffBottomY - (staffPos - 2) * (lineSpacing / 2);
41. 
42.   const clefFontSize = 56;
43.   const clefX = 4;
44.   const clefY = staffTop - lineSpacing * 1.5;
45. 
46.   const noteAreaStart = leftMargin + 20;
47.   const noteAreaWidth = svgWidth - noteAreaStart - 20;
48.   const noteStep = fixedSpacing ?? noteAreaWidth / Math.max(sequence.length, 1);
49.   const calcNoteX = (i: number) => noteAreaStart + i * noteStep + noteStep / 2;
50. 
51.   const getNoteColor = (i: number): string => {
52.     if (i < detected.length) return detected[i].correct ? '#4CAF50' : '#F44336';
53.     if (i === highlightIndex && status === 'playing') return '#3F51B5';
54.     if (i === currentNoteIndex && status === 'listening') return '#3F51B5';
55.     return '#333333';
56.   };
57. 
58.   const isFilled = (i: number): boolean => {
59.     if (i < detected.length) return true;
60.     if (i === highlightIndex && status === 'playing') return true;
61.     if (i === currentNoteIndex && status === 'listening') return true;
62.     return false;
63.   };
64. 
65.   const ledgerLineHalfWidth = noteRadius * 2.8;
66. 
67.   const getLedgerLines = (staffPos: number, cx: number): React.ReactNode[] => {
68.     const lines: React.ReactNode[] = [];
69.     const noteY = calcNoteY(staffPos);
70.     for (let n = 1; ; n++) {
71.       const ly = staffTop - n * lineSpacing;
72.       if (noteY > ly) break;
73.       lines.push(
74.         <line
75.           key={`above-${n}`}
76.           x1={cx - ledgerLineHalfWidth}
77.           y1={ly}
78.           x2={cx + ledgerLineHalfWidth}
79.           y2={ly}
80.           stroke="#555555"
81.           strokeWidth="1.5"
82.         />
83.       );
84.       if (n > 10) break;
85.     }
86.     for (let n = 1; ; n++) {
87.       const ly = staffBottomY + n * lineSpacing;
88.       if (noteY < ly) break;
89.       lines.push(
90.         <line
91.           key={`below-${n}`}
92.           x1={cx - ledgerLineHalfWidth}
93.           y1={ly}
94.           x2={cx + ledgerLineHalfWidth}
95.           y2={ly}
96.           stroke="#555555"
97.           strokeWidth="1.5"
98.         />
99.       );
100.       if (n > 10) break;
101.     }
102.     return lines;
103.   };
104. 
105.   return (
106.     <svg width="100%" viewBox={`0 0 ${svgWidth} ${svgHeight}`} style={{ display: 'block' }}>
107.       {[0, 1, 2, 3, 4].map(lineIdx => {
108.         const y = staffTop + lineIdx * lineSpacing;
109.         return <line key={lineIdx} x1={leftMargin} y1={y} x2={svgWidth - 10} y2={y} stroke="#333333" strokeWidth="1.5" />;
110.       })}
111. 
112.       <text x={clefX} y={clefY} fontSize={clefFontSize} fontFamily="serif" fill="#333" style={{ userSelect: 'none' }}>{'\uD834\uDD1E'}</text>
113. 
114.       {sequence.map((midi, i) => {
115.         const sp = staffPositions[i];
116.         if (sp === undefined) return null;
117.         const cx = calcNoteX(i);
118.         const cy = calcNoteY(sp);
119.         const color = getNoteColor(i);
120.         const filled = isFilled(i);
121.         const ledgers = getLedgerLines(sp, cx);
122. 
123.         return (
124.           <g key={i}>
125.             {ledgers}
126.             <circle
127.               cx={cx}
128.               cy={cy}
129.               r={noteRadius}
130.               fill={color}
131.               stroke={color}
132.               strokeWidth="1.5"
133.             />
134.             {!filled && (
135.               <circle
136.                 cx={cx}
137.                 cy={cy}
138.                 r={noteRadius - 2.5}
139.                 fill="white"
140.               />
141.             )}
142.             <text
143.               x={cx}
144.               y={cy + noteRadius + 12}
145.               textAnchor="middle"
146.               fontSize="10"
147.               fill={color}
148.               style={{ userSelect: 'none' }}
149.             >
150.               {midiToLabel(midi)}
151.             </text>
152.           </g>
153.         );
154.       })}
155.     </svg>
156.   );
157. }
158.
```

<sub>⏱️ 1953m 0s</sub>

### 💬 Copilot

Two bugs fixed in the Tauri staff:

1. **Wrong Y position** — `clefY` was `staffTop - 1.5 × lineSpacing = 38`. Since SVG `\<text y\>` is the *baseline*, with fontSize 56 the glyph rendered from y ≈ −18 to y = 38 — almost entirely above the viewBox and clipped invisible. Fixed to `staffTop + 5.2 × lineSpacing` so the baseline sits near the bottom of the staff and the glyph spans the full staff height.

2. **Wrong font** — `fontFamily="serif"` doesn't map to any font with the Musical Symbols Unicode block. Fixed to explicitly list `'Segoe UI Symbol'` (Windows), `'Apple Symbols'` (macOS), `'FreeSerif'` (Linux), `'Arial Unicode MS'`, then `serif` as last resort.
